service.name: Blood Pressure
service.informativeText: Abstract: This service exposes blood pressure and other data from a blood pressure monitor intended for healthcare applications. Summary: The BLOOD PRESSURE Service exposes blood pressure and other data related to a blood pressure monitor.

characteristic.name: Blood Pressure Measurement
characteristic.informativeText: Abstract: The Blood Pressure Measurement characteristic is a variable length structure containing a Flags field, a Blood Pressure Measurement Compound Value field, and contains additional fields such as Time Stamp, Pulse Rate and User ID as determined by the contents of the Flags field.

descriptor.name: Client Characteristic Configuration
descriptor.informativeText:
Abstract: The Client Characteristic Configuration descriptor defines how the characteristic may be configured by a specific client.
Summary: This descriptor shall be persistent across connections for bonded devices. The Client Characteristic Configuration descriptor is unique for each client. A client may read and write this descriptor to determine and set the configuration for that client. Authentication and authorization may be required by the server to write this descriptor. The default value for the Client Characteristic Configuration descriptor is 0x00. Upon connection of non-binded clients, this descriptor is set to the default value.

descriptor.name: Client Characteristic Configuration
descriptor.informativeText:
Abstract: The Client Characteristic Configuration descriptor defines how the characteristic may be configured by a specific client.
Summary: This descriptor shall be persistent across connections for bonded devices. The Client Characteristic Configuration descriptor is unique for each client. A client may read and write this descriptor to determine and set the configuration for that client. Authentication and authorization may be required by the server to write this descriptor. The default value for the Client Characteristic Configuration descriptor is 0x00. Upon connection of non-binded clients, this descriptor is set to the default value.

characteristic.name: Blood Pressure Feature
characteristic.informativeText: Abstract: The Blood Pressure Feature characteristic is used to describe the supported features of the Blood Pressure Sensor.
